description_long: This modern bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by lush landscaping, including dense green trees and vibrant purple flowering bushes. The structure features a flat roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a mix of white and gray exterior walls, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The property includes a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, a wooden deck, and a small circular play structure. The front facade is defined by a prominent entryway and a series of large glass panels, while the rear opens onto a generous lawn and outdoor living spaces. The perimeter is enclosed by thick hedges and flowering plants, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The overall layout is open and airy, with clear zones for living, recreation, and relaxation.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, expansive glass windows, and lush landscaping, featuring a pool and outdoor living areas. The design emphasizes openness, privacy, and contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and dense landscaping with purple flowering bushes and tall trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, wooden deck, and open lawn, framed by thick green hedges.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the bungalow, prominent glass facades, and a circular play structure near the edge of the property.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view focusing on the pool, deck, and the open green space, with the building's white and gray exterior visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
